name: Belvo
description: Open Finance API platform for Latam.

extra.name: Belvo
extra.long_description:
We are Belvo, a financial API platform for Latam that enables any company or developer to access and interpret their end-users' financial information, through one easy-to-use API. Think Plaid for Latam.

Our vision is to power the next generation of financial services in Latam by enabling more inclusive, efficient and empowering offerings through tech and data. Latam is a very exciting and dynamic place to be right now and a great place to build infrastructure for the next generation of financial products for a huge market.
extra.one_liner: Open Finance API platform for Latam.

name: CARUPI
description: CARUPI is the world's 1st managed P2P marketplace for used cars

extra.name: CARUPI
extra.long_description: Carupi is the world's 1st lightly managed peer-to-peer digital marketplace ("C2C"), like Airbnb, for used cars, allowing individuals to safely and conveniently buy and sell cars from home with the push of a button. Differently from pure marketplaces such as craigslist, we take care of every transaction end-to-end (as 'concierges'), from taking car photos at the user's place to advertising his car, managing offers, taking his car (fully insured) to buyers for free at-home test drives, handling paperwork and payment. And differently from dealers or dealer-like companies, we don't use any physical infrastructure or need to buy cars for inventory.
extra.one_liner: CARUPI is the world's 1st managed P2P marketplace for used cars

name: Oico
description: B2B marketplace for construction material in Brazil.

extra.name: Oico

name: Hubla
description: All-in-one platform for creators to sell courses and subscriptions

extra.name: Hubla
extra.long_description:
Hubla is the Shopify for creators, enabling anyone to build, manage, and grow their online business. We provide powerful tools to create courses, communities, sell products, manage memberships, and deliver content—all in one platform. For example, a fitness coach can charge her audience for a unique digital weight-loss program, turning passion into profit.

Creators need simple, flexible tools to succeed. Hubla’s fully customizable platform lets them own their strategy, stand out from competitors, and create unique experiences. This approach works—our top creator earns over $8M annually.

Hubla is leading the creator economy revolution, empowering individuals to transform their expertise into sustainable, scalable businesses.
extra.one_liner: All-in-one platform for creators to sell courses and subscriptions

name: Gonddo

extra.name: Gonddo
extra.long_description: Gonddo is a B2B wholesale marketplace that digitalizes inventories purchases for independent retailers and brings technology to modernise distribution and trade credit for SMBs in Brazil. With gonddo, retailers can find fresh products, discover new brands and easily connect with wholesalers
extra.one_liner: Wholesale marketplace for independent retailers buy & manage inventory

By using the Z1 app and a prepaid card linked to their account, teenagers can begin their road to financial independence by learning to manage and spend their money, as well as having a place to receive money they earn through jobs and small businesses.

name: Estoca
description: The Logistics Operating System for E-commerce in LatAm

extra.name: Estoca
extra.long_description: Estoca is a cloud-based logistics platform that uses AI to optimize fulfillment, warehousing, and last-mile operations for D2C brands in Latin America. Estoca provides customizable software and an integrated partner network that automate every step from storage to delivery. Our AI-driven workflows help merchants process more packages per square meter, per hour, and per person, accelerating delivery speed while reducing operational costs.
extra.one_liner: The Logistics Operating System for E-commerce in LatAm

name: Abstra
description: Automate finance operations with Python and AI
location: Rio de Janeiro, RJ, Brazil; Remote

extra.name: Abstra
extra.all_locations: Rio de Janeiro, RJ, Brazil; Remote
extra.long_description:
Abstra is a platform that allows finance teams to build, run, and automate their workflows using Python and AI.

Instead of relying on spreadsheets, ERPs, and manual processes, teams can create programmable workflows for tasks like reporting, reconciliations, approvals, and integrations with systems like SAP.

We provide a developer-friendly environment where finance and technical teams can turn business processes into code, connect to their existing tools, and run everything in a controlled, auditable way.

Our goal is to become the operating system for finance operations, where workflows are not static or manual, but versioned, automated, and continuously improved.
extra.one_liner: Automate finance operations with Python and AI

name: Zaz OS
description: Lovable for internal products

extra.name: Zaz OS
extra.long_description:
Zaz OS is a “Lovable for internal products”: an AI-native platform with an opinionated infrastructure that makes it easy to build and edit Apps and Agents through vibe-coding. Using spec-driven development, it ensures consistency and security for critical processes, solving challenges like user management, notifications, and multi-app integration within a single interface.

With over eight years of experience in back-office and HR, Zaz OS was designed from the ground up with core structural issues already solved and the flexibility to adapt to each company’s unique needs. The result is the speed to build and iterate, combined with the robustness required for mission-critical processes — the ultimate solution to replace the Frankenstein stack of SaaS tools that currently dominates company management.
As companies grow, the lack of customization of current software forces Heads of HR to buy multiple disconnected tools, allocate engineers to build and maintain people-related projects or use spreadsheets.
extra.one_liner: Lovable for internal products

name: Sproutfi
description: Latin Americas' first investing social network.  Learn. Share. Invest.

extra.name: Sproutfi
extra.long_description:
We're on a mission to make investing in the US markets accessible and fair to everyone in Latin America.  Our social features make it seamless for investors to mingle, share investment ideas and learn from each other.   We make it super easy to invest in thousands of US stocks & ETFs, with as little as a $1 USD, no account minimums, and no fees.  

Our team is composed of highly experienced builders hailing from Goldman Sachs, E*Trade Financial, Nubank, ING, Wise...
extra.one_liner: Latin Americas' first investing social network.  Learn. Share. Invest.

name: Pluggy
description: Plaid for Brazil: we allow developers to access users' financial data

extra.name: Pluggy
extra.long_description:
Pluggy is a B2B Fintech that allows any developer to connect to the data from their users' bank and broker accounts, essentially Plaid for Brazil. 

We are 100% focused in Brazil. One of the largest markets in the world. Its complexity, risks and challenges require its own solution.

Local focus and our deep experience in banking tech engineering allowed Pluggy to create a product that is considered by our customers as the only one to provide reliable data at the right time to market.

We currently cover 90% of the bank accounts in Brazil a market of more than 7 billion USD. 

We are Pluggy!
extra.one_liner: Plaid for Brazil: we allow developers to access users' financial data

name: fluke
description: fluke is a full-digital mobile operator in Brazil

extra.name: fluke
extra.long_description:
Brazilians hate the experience of using the traditional mobile carriers. They force you to pay for data packages you don’t need and make it impossible to switch your plans. Fluke offers a better customer experience and that’s why we have a CAC that is 50% lower and an LTV that’s 30% higher than traditional carriers.

What’s smart about our approach is we rent infrastructure from these incumbents and build a better customer experience on top of it. This keeps our costs lows and lets us focus on what really matters: the customer experience! 

We have the best network and customers are switching to us because of the service and flexibility to build their own customized mobile plans.

We are doing in telco what Nubank did in banking in Brazil.

We are Fluke, thank you!
extra.one_liner: fluke is a full-digital mobile operator in Brazil

name: Cartpanda
description: Global online sales platform

extra.name: Cartpanda
extra.long_description:
As an ecommerce platform, we provide a complete ecosystem for creators and entrepreneurs to sell and promote their products and services, including tools for product management, affiliate management, payment processing and much more. Users can sell various types of products, including digital goods, services, events, and physical items.

Cartpanda help entrepreneurs scale their global sales by providing a high converting checkout page and payment solution, capable to convert to 180+ currencies and languages.
extra.one_liner: Global online sales platform

name: Portão 3
description: We are the frictionless way for companies to make payments.

extra.name: Portão 3
extra.long_description:
Portão 3 is Ramp for LATAM. We are the frictionless way for companies to make payments.

The company is founded by Fernando, second-time entrepreneur with past successful exit and ex-CPO of large IT consulting firms in Brazil and Bianca, experienced entrepreneur that handled payments for Cargill and funded startups in travel and growth. We've grown bootstrapped from the beginning and we were in the Y Combinator S21 batch.
extra.one_liner: We are the frictionless way for companies to make payments.

name: Cumbuca
description: Bare-metal access to Brazil's Open Finance and Pix systems

extra.name: Cumbuca
extra.long_description: Cumbuca is an infratech bank for developers to build financial products with direct Central Bank connectivity. Instead of working around unreliable middleware, you get bare-metal access to Pix, payment initiation, and data APIs under our license, so you ship products faster and we handle the compliance. There's no vendor lock-in, and your service will never be disrupted by us.
extra.one_liner: Bare-metal access to Brazil's Open Finance and Pix systems

name: Ahazou
description: Podium for local businesses in Latam

extra.name: Ahazou
extra.long_description: Ahazou is a SaaS app that helps offline local businesses to connect online with their customers to promote their brand, to build their reputation and to sell more. We've reached USD100k MRR with 16k+ subscribers. Our vision is to build the next all-in-one platform for 50 million local businesses to grow online in Latam. The company is founded by Rui Miadaira - 10+ years building local businesses, 3x entrepreneur, tech background with a Harvard MBA - and has built a team from iFood, Movile, PicPay. Ahazou is backed by GFC, Monashees, Y Combinator (S21) and more.
extra.one_liner: Podium for local businesses in Latam

name: Compra Rápida
description: One-click checkout and AI sales assistant for LatAm.

extra.name: Compra Rápida
extra.long_description: Compra Rápida is checkout made easy. Our platform offers a headless checkout experience for e-commerce stores, enabling retailers to increase conversions, retain abandonment, and boost sales. Registered users can buy at any e-commerce site from our network without requiring lengthy registration forms or complicated payment processes. Stores can automate their sales and recovery flows with our AI sales assistant. We aim to empower retailers to sell more while providing shoppers with a superior, humanized, and effortless buying experience.
extra.one_liner: One-click checkout and AI sales assistant for LatAm.

name: Miggos
description: Wholesale marketplace for mom & pop clothing shops in LATAM

extra.name: Miggos
extra.long_description:
Miggos is a wholesale marketplace for the 5 million+ mom & pop clothing shops in Latin America.

We're on a mission to make the lives of these mom & pop store owners in Latin America easier, connecting brands and manufacturers to small retailers and facilitating the entire process of purchasing, selecting, and discovering new products, credit, logistics, and service.
extra.one_liner: Wholesale marketplace for mom & pop clothing shops in LATAM

name: Vobi
description: All-in-one project management software for construction SMBs in Latam

extra.name: Vobi
extra.long_description:
Vobi is a project management platform for small construction businesses, like home remodeling companies, contractors, and architects.

We help them save up to 50% of their time spent on manual work, mainly on the procurement and estimation processes, so they have more time to focus on their core activities. Through Vobi, they can manage projects from start to finish, collaborate with their customers, plan, quote, and make purchases or payments to suppliers, all in one place. No more spreadsheets and papers!
extra.one_liner: All-in-one project management software for construction SMBs in Latam

name: Pantore Pay
description: Working capital for Brazilian restaurants

extra.name: Pantore Pay
extra.long_description: Pantore Pay is the solution for restaurants cash flow issues and allows restaurants to shop for supplies and pay any other bills using Pantore's credit line.
extra.one_liner: Working capital for Brazilian restaurants

name: ECSA
description: AI Agent runs the entire international trade operation

extra.name: ECSA
extra.long_description:
Our AI Agent runs the entire international trade operation: handles customs processes with government agencies and regulators, orchestrates cross-border payments, and provides credit solutions for trade finance.

 Built by ECSA, a Central Bank–licensed FX bank, the agent allows exporters and importers to move goods and money seamlessly across borders. 

Today it powers +USD 1b in annual volume across +17.000 transactions, cutting costs and eliminating regulatory friction.
extra.one_liner: AI Agent runs the entire international trade operation

name: Drip
description: Shop and pay in installments anywhere

extra.name: Drip
extra.long_description:
Drip combines the best of Pix and a credit card. We enable customers to pay with credit and earn 2%+ cashback with the speed and widespread acceptance of Pix.

Through our app customers can onboard, shop nearly anywhere and manage their payments. We're enabling transactions via  Pix's existing network (85%+ of e-comm).
extra.one_liner: Shop and pay in installments anywhere

name: Vendah
description: Vendah is building a Faire-style marketplace for LATAM’s +50M…

extra.name: Vendah
extra.long_description:
Vendah is building a marketplace that connects digital-first beauty brands to a network of individual sellers across Brazil, powered by embedded microcredit. Brazil is one of the largest beauty markets globally (~$30B), with millions of individuals already selling through fragmented, offline channels that lack modern infrastructure.

After pivoting to a marketplace + credit model, traction has accelerated: GMV is growing ~30% MoM, we’re approaching 1,000 active sellers, and risk-adjusted margins are now positive and improving. We’re building a network of sellers powered by a proprietary credit engine.
extra.one_liner: Vendah is building a Faire-style marketplace for LATAM’s +50M…

name: Briefer
description: The collaborative data platform.

extra.name: Briefer
extra.long_description:
Briefer helps data scientists and analysts build interactive visualizations and data apps using a Notion-like interface.

Connect to your data sources, write SQL or Python, collaborate through comments and multiplayer editing, and run code in whichever compute environments you need.
extra.one_liner: The collaborative data platform.

name: Salvy
description: Mobile carrier for businesses in Brazil

extra.name: Salvy
extra.long_description:
Salvy is a mobile carrier for businesses in Brazil. Over 1800 companies use Salvy to manage over 20,000 mobile lines, cutting costs by over 50%.
The founders have worked many years together in Brazil's largest fintechs (Nubank and EBANX).

Today, every carrier in Brazil has roughly the same network quality - it isn't a differentiator. If you're an IT manager who needs to deploy 2k lines, you want an integrated and seamless solution. You need to deploy this resource, fast. Salvy provides a software layer that makes deploying and managing mobile lines a fast and efficient process, integrated with HRIS, ERPs, and others.

This is a massive market: there are 55 million b2b mobile lines in Brazil, which adds up to 5 billion dollars in ARR in just one country.
extra.one_liner: Mobile carrier for businesses in Brazil

name: Ruvo
description: The Global Dollar App for Brazil

extra.name: Ruvo
extra.long_description:
Ruvo is a global account for receiving, holding, and moving money between USD and BRL.

We connect Pix, crypto, and Visa so you can receive USD from abroad, convert between USD and BRL in minutes, send money to the U.S., spend worldwide, and save in digital dollars with yield — all in one place.

Ruvo supports both personal (CPF) and business (CNPJ) accounts, with low fees, strong security, and direct Pix settlement.

Formerly known as Cacao.
extra.one_liner: The Global Dollar App for Brazil
